overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit downtown district. The character traverses covered sidewalks, crosses wide intersections, and passes under elevated highway structures with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway alongside commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beside a building with distinctive blue neon lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall building facade featuring horizontal rows of glowing blue circular neon lights
multi-level highway or monorail structure spanning across the street ahead
tall palm trees lining the center median of the street
large digital billboards displaying purple and blue neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered urban sidewalk flanked by a building with distinctive blue circular neon lights on the left and a busy street on the right. The elevated highway structure looms ahead while palm trees and neon billboards line the street. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exits covered sidewalk and steps into open sunlit intersection crosswalk
green sports car drives past from right to left while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection following the broad yellow crosswalk lines

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: modern glass and steel skyscrapers towering in the background
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines marking the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright sunlit intersection as the character crosses the wide street. Tall glass skyscrapers rise in the background while a green sports car passes by. The elevated highway structure draws closer as the character follows the yellow crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk transitioning into covered area

events.description: turns right onto the sidewalk after completing the street crossing

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk after crossing, approaching the shadow of the overpass

entered.detail: white concrete stairs leading up to a building entrance
tall building with dark tinted glass facade

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character turns right onto a sidewalk lined with modern buildings. A concrete staircase appears on the left while the elevated highway structure looms closer overhead. The lighting begins to transition from bright sunlight to shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: enters deep shadow under the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the dark overpass, passing other pedestrians and observing the urban environment

notable_agents.action: man in white suit walking in the same direction ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal railing running along the building edge
textured trunk of palm tree in sidewalk planter

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the massive elevated highway structure where natural light is mostly blocked, creating a dimly lit urban canyon. Metal railings line the left side while palm tree trunks appear on the right. Other pedestrians share the walkway as vehicles pass by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: police cordon area under elevated highway

events.description: approaches police scene with flashing emergency lights and cordoned off area

agents.ego_description: slowing down to observe the police activity and emergency scene ahead

notable_agents.action: police officer in blue uniform standing next to the patrol car
white police car with blue stripes and flashing red and blue emergency lights

entered.detail: yellow and black striped police tape cordoning off the sidewalk area
flashing red and blue emergency lights illuminating the dark underpass

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a police cordon under the overpass where emergency lights flash red and blue. Yellow police tape blocks off an area of the sidewalk while a police officer stands by the patrol car. The scene is dimly lit with the artificial glow of emergency lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban sidewalk through a bright city intersection and into the shadowed depths of an elevated highway underpass. It begins beside a building adorned with blue circular neon lights, moving past palm trees and billboards toward a looming concrete overpass. As the character steps into a wide, sunlit intersection, the view opens up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and a passing green sports car before the camera follows yellow crosswalk markings. The scene then shifts into deepening shadow as the character turns right past modern buildings and a concrete staircase, eventually entering the dimly lit urban canyon beneath the massive highway structure. Finally, the natural light vanishes completely, replaced by the artificial red and blue glow of emergency lights as the camera approaches a police cordon and a patrol car blocking the sidewalk.
